overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a gold convertible driving through a futuristic neon-lit city. The vehicle navigates from a traffic light through commercial districts, under massive overpasses, and past a distinctive red torii gate into an open plaza area. The atmosphere is hazy and overcast with pervasive neon signage and futuristic architecture.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle begins accelerating from stop
vehicle continues straight through intersection following the red sedan ahead

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light initially, then accelerates smoothly through the intersection following traffic

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead through the intersection, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red initially then green
massive concrete highway structure spanning across the scene
futuristic gold convertible with red neon underglow, the ego vehicle
red sedan driving ahead on the same road
tall buildings with bright neon signage and advertisements
metal railing separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with the gold convertible stopped at a red traffic light beneath an elevated highway overpass. As the light turns green at 4 seconds, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection, following a red sedan ahead. Neon-lit commercial buildings line the left side while the massive concrete overpass structure dominates the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with neon signage

events.description: vehicle makes a left turn at the intersection, changing direction from north to west
entering denser commercial area with increased neon signage and building density

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn then cruising through the neon-lit commercial street, passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk next to metal fencing

entered.detail: tightly packed multi-story buildings with futuristic facades
large illuminated advertising screens and neon signs in various colors
yellow zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
metal barrier running along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a left turn at 10 seconds, entering a dense commercial corridor lined with towering buildings covered in neon billboards. The elevated highway now runs overhead as the car passes yellow crosswalk markings and pedestrians on the right sidewalk. The environment becomes increasingly urban with vibrant neon advertisements illuminating the hazy atmosphere.

events.description: entering the shadow of the massive concrete overpass, significant reduction in natural light
passing street sign reading 'Charter' while continuing under the overpass system

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the dimly lit underpass corridor, navigating between concrete walls

entered.detail: massive concrete highway deck spanning the road creating a tunnel-like effect
thick concrete columns supporting the elevated highway
large illuminated advertising screen mounted on the right wall
smooth concrete retaining walls lining the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a darkened underpass beneath the elevated highway at 22 seconds, where natural light is replaced by artificial illumination from digital billboards. The environment becomes enclosed with concrete walls on the left and support pillars passing by. The street sign 'Charter' appears on the right at 30 seconds as the car continues through this sheltered concrete corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching traditional gate structure in commercial district

events.description: exiting the underpass into brighter daylight, natural light increases significantly
red torii gate becomes visible in the distance, marking a distinct architectural landmark
vehicle passes directly under the red torii gate structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating out of the underpass and driving toward the prominent red torii gate landmark

notable_agents.action: pedestrians visible on the distant sidewalk near the gate

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese gate structure with red pillars and black roof, illuminated with red neon accents
high-rise buildings with dense window patterns and signage
tall modern street lamps lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass at 35 seconds, the vehicle enters brighter light and approaches a distinctive red torii gate that dominates the street ahead. The environment transitions back to an open commercial area with tall buildings and street lights. At 48 seconds, the car passes directly under the massive gate structure, marking a transition to a new district.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza avenue with palm trees and modern architecture

events.description: entering open plaza area with palm trees and contemporary buildings, space widens significantly

agents.ego_description: cruising through the open plaza area past palm trees and modern buildings, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the wide avenue
wide open paved space with reduced building density
contemporary high-rise structures with reflective glass facades
orange and white striped construction barriers on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After passing through the torii gate, the vehicle enters a spacious open plaza at 50 seconds, characterized by palm trees lining the left side and modern glass buildings in the distance. The road widens significantly, offering clear views of the sky above, and orange construction barriers appear on the right as the car continues down the broad avenue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a gold convertible as it navigates from a congested urban intersection through a sheltered concrete corridor and into a wide, open plaza. It begins stopped at a red light beneath a massive highway overpass, accelerating forward through an intersection lined with neon-lit commercial buildings. As the vehicle executes a left turn, the scene shifts into a dense commercial corridor where towering billboards illuminate a hazy atmosphere before the camera enters a darkened underpass characterized by concrete walls and artificial digital lighting. The environment then opens back up into brighter light as the car approaches and passes directly under a massive red torii gate. Finally, the road widens significantly into a spacious plaza featuring palm trees and modern glass buildings under an expansive sky.
